event.name: Breakpoint 2025
event.description:
10 Dec 4pm - 7pm
Arrival, check in, and kick off the conference with a relaxed welcome reception to connect with fellow attendees.

11 Dec 9am - 7pm
Kick off Breakpoint with keynote talks, product launches, and thought-provoking panels from industry leaders.

12 Dec 10am - 7pm
Keep the momentum going with more keynotes, deep-dive panels, and conversations shaping the future of web3.

13 Dec 10am - 7pm
Close out Breakpoint with final talks, and a closing celebration to cap off the week.

13 Dec 9pm - 2am
Closing celebration
